13 Slides
The Full Deck
Slide 01 / 13
Askloud
Plain English in. Formatted tables out. Zero data exfiltration. Supporting AWS, GCP, and Azure from a single unified interface.
Why Askloud
Built different.
Privacy First

Zero Data Exfiltration

Your actual infrastructure inventory never leaves your machine. Only the plain English question and schema go to the Anthropic API — never your resource data.

Translation Engine

LLM as Syntax Translator

The LLM parses natural language into a structured JMESPath query plan, executed locally by the Python engine. Not a data processor — a translator.

Multi-Cloud

Rosetta Stone for Cloud

Normalizes disparate data models across AWS, GCP, and Azure. Ask about a resource without knowing or caring which cloud it lives in.

Cost Optimized

Aggressive Token Savings

Direct Search bypasses the LLM entirely at $0. No RAG, no chat history. Anthropic Prompt Caching reuses system context across turns.

Shell Native

Unix Pipeline Compatible

Pipe output through grep, awk, wc using | cmd. Prefix ! to run raw shell commands directly within the Askloud prompt. Fits your existing workflow.

No-Code Config

Columns Without PRs

Adding or removing output fields is a simple .conf file edit. Field names resolve automatically from nested paths or tag keys — no redeployment needed.

Principal SRE · Flipkart
★★★★★
April 2026
The zero data exfiltration design is exactly what our security team has been asking for. We manage 30+ AWS accounts and the concurrent discovery is a game changer. Putting this in front of our platform team next week.
DevOps / SRE

Cloud Architect · TCS
★★★★☆
April 2026
Loved the Rosetta Stone analogy for multi-cloud normalization. The columns-without-code-changes feature is genuinely novel — I have spent weeks on Python to do what a .conf edit does here. Would love to see Azure coverage expanded.
Platform Engineering

The aggressive token optimization section is what sold me. Most AI tools ignore the cost angle entirely — seeing Direct Search at $0 with full offline capability is impressive. The session cost summary on exit is a thoughtful touch.
